markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Explore a potential collaboration between growthx.ai and dowhatworks.io.](https://fathom.video/share/eJPqDDQ8oMV3h-5k4yw_vQ58M2yuwxxs?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strong Collaboration Fit:** Both companies target the same mid-market/enterprise ICP (VPs/CMOs at $50M+ ARR B2B SaaS) and use content as a primary lead driver.](https://fathom.video/share/eJPqDDQ8oMV3h-5k4yw_vQ58M2yuwxxs?tab=summary&timestamp=1482.0)
  - [**Clear Partnership Model:** A co-hosted webinar where both parties drive attendance and share the lead list. dowhatworks.io provides proprietary A/B test data, and growthx.ai gets the recording for its paid community.](https://fathom.video/share/eJPqDDQ8oMV3h-5k4yw_vQ58M2yuwxxs?tab=summary&timestamp=1588.0)
  - [**Actionable Next Step:** Jason will send Casey a list of content-related A/B testing questions to check against dowhatworks.io's database for viable data-driven topics.](https://fathom.video/share/eJPqDDQ8oMV3h-5k4yw_vQ58M2yuwxxs?tab=summary&timestamp=1689.0)
  - [**Urgency:** Both parties are keen to execute a collaboration before year-end.](https://fathom.video/share/eJPqDDQ8oMV3h-5k4yw_vQ58M2yuwxxs?tab=summary&timestamp=1745.0)

## Topics

### Company Overviews

  - [**dowhatworks.io:**](https://fathom.video/share/eJPqDDQ8oMV3h-5k4yw_vQ58M2yuwxxs?tab=summary&timestamp=364.0)
      - [**Core Business:** A/B test data platform and research consultancy.](https://fathom.video/share/eJPqDDQ8oMV3h-5k4yw_vQ58M2yuwxxs?tab=summary&timestamp=364.0)
      - [**Platform:** Patented tech tracks public A/B tests to reveal winning versions and element retention trends (e.g., Ramp's homepage hero tests).](https://fathom.video/share/eJPqDDQ8oMV3h-5k4yw_vQ58M2yuwxxs?tab=summary&timestamp=474.0)
      - [**Consulting:** Research team for large clients (Disney, Adobe) with time-sensitive questions, creating a proprietary data feedback loop.](https://fathom.video/share/eJPqDDQ8oMV3h-5k4yw_vQ58M2yuwxxs?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)
      - [**ICP:** VPs/CMOs at $50M+ ARR B2B SaaS, FinTech, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/eJPqDDQ8oMV3h-5k4yw_vQ58M2yuwxxs?tab=summary&timestamp=1482.0)
  - [**growthx.ai:**](https://fathom.video/share/eJPqDDQ8oMV3h-5k4yw_vQ58M2yuwxxs?tab=summary&timestamp=829.0)
      - [**Core Business:** Agency building AI agent systems for content creation (e.g., Webflow developer docs).](https://fathom.video/share/eJPqDDQ8oMV3h-5k4yw_vQ58M2yuwxxs?tab=summary&timestamp=829.0)
      - [**Lead Gen:** High-ticket agency contracts ($200k+/yr) sourced via dinners and workshops.](https://fathom.video/share/eJPqDDQ8oMV3h-5k4yw_vQ58M2yuwxxs?tab=summary&timestamp=928.0)
      - [**New Product:** A paid community ($30/mo + $150 fee, 78 members) to monetize the workshop audience and provide expert content.](https://fathom.video/share/eJPqDDQ8oMV3h-5k4yw_vQ58M2yuwxxs?tab=summary&timestamp=992.0)
      - [**ICP:** Director/VP+ in B2B SaaS.](https://fathom.video/share/eJPqDDQ8oMV3h-5k4yw_vQ58M2yuwxxs?tab=summary&timestamp=1546.0)

### Content Strategy & Lead Gen

  - [**dowhatworks.io:**](https://fathom.video/share/eJPqDDQ8oMV3h-5k4yw_vQ58M2yuwxxs?tab=summary&timestamp=364.0)
      - [**Primary Channel:** LinkedIn, driving \~30% of enterprise deals.](https://fathom.video/share/eJPqDDQ8oMV3h-5k4yw_vQ58M2yuwxxs?tab=summary&timestamp=61.0)
      - [**Strategy:** "Distribution mindset" → highlight other companies to gain built-in amplification.](https://fathom.video/share/eJPqDDQ8oMV3h-5k4yw_vQ58M2yuwxxs?tab=summary&timestamp=96.0)
      - [**Paid Amplification:** Brands often run ads on positive, viral content, achieving very low CPMs ($5–$6) for massive awareness.](https://fathom.video/share/eJPqDDQ8oMV3h-5k4yw_vQ58M2yuwxxs?tab=summary&timestamp=168.0)
  - [**growthx.ai:**](https://fathom.video/share/eJPqDDQ8oMV3h-5k4yw_vQ58M2yuwxxs?tab=summary&timestamp=829.0)
      - [**Primary Channel:** Workshops and a paid community.](https://fathom.video/share/eJPqDDQ8oMV3h-5k4yw_vQ58M2yuwxxs?tab=summary&timestamp=949.0)
      - [**Goal:** Add value to the community by bringing in domain experts like Casey.](https://fathom.video/share/eJPqDDQ8oMV3h-5k4yw_vQ58M2yuwxxs?tab=summary&timestamp=1360.0)

### Proposed Collaboration

  - [**Format:** Co-hosted webinar.](https://fathom.video/share/eJPqDDQ8oMV3h-5k4yw_vQ58M2yuwxxs?tab=summary&timestamp=1588.0)
  - [**Topic:** A/B testing best practices for content pages (e.g., blog CTAs, layout).](https://fathom.video/share/eJPqDDQ8oMV3h-5k4yw_vQ58M2yuwxxs?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [**Value Exchange:**](https://fathom.video/share/eJPqDDQ8oMV3h-5k4yw_vQ58M2yuwxxs?tab=summary&timestamp=1423.0)
      - [**dowhatworks.io:** Lead flow from growthx.ai's audience.](https://fathom.video/share/eJPqDDQ8oMV3h-5k4yw_vQ58M2yuwxxs?tab=summary&timestamp=1423.0)
      - [**growthx.ai:** Proprietary data and expert content for its community.](https://fathom.video/share/eJPqDDQ8oMV3h-5k4yw_vQ58M2yuwxxs?tab=summary&timestamp=1360.0)
  - [**Asset:** The webinar recording would be added to the growthx.ai community library.](https://fathom.video/share/eJPqDDQ8oMV3h-5k4yw_vQ58M2yuwxxs?tab=summary&timestamp=1588.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jason:** Send Casey a list of 5 broad questions on content-related A/B testing.](https://fathom.video/share/eJPqDDQ8oMV3h-5k4yw_vQ58M2yuwxxs?tab=summary&timestamp=1689.0)
  - [**Casey:** Review the questions against the dowhatworks.io database to identify viable topics.](https://fathom.video/share/eJPqDDQ8oMV3h-5k4yw_vQ58M2yuwxxs?tab=summary&timestamp=1689.0)
  - [**Both:** Discuss topics and timelines for a potential year-end webinar.](https://fathom.video/share/eJPqDDQ8oMV3h-5k4yw_vQ58M2yuwxxs?tab=summary&timestamp=1745.0)
